blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
